verdict_rationale: Default-mode validation passes for every existing packet — no regressions. New strict-mode checks (verdict enum, human_review obligation, L4 action coverage, traceability target resolution) are gated behind opt-in flag and exit 7 for unverifiable-without-review. The synthetic test suite covers every branch with documented exit codes.
rollout_plan: Each existing packet that fails strict mode will be repaired and flipped to strict: true in its packet.json as a separate roadmap step (1.2-ratchet). The hash-based L3 mitigation is implemented in the validator but requires bin/verify to record assumptions_sha256 on every run; that change ships in the same ratchet.
